requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter Safety — IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器安全——IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2证据
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器安全——IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2證據

summary.en: Maldives PV inverter tenders and utility reviews commonly expect internationally recognisable safety evidence for grid-tied inverters, especially IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test reports for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. The requirement may appear in owner specifications, donor-financed project documents, utility review comments, or EPC procurement documents rather than as a single standalone Maldives PV inverter product regulation. For rooftop, resort, island-utility, and solar-plus-storage projects, the safety file should identify the exact inverter model family, power rating, environmental ratings, protective functions, and installation constraints.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫光伏逆变器招标和公用事业审查通常期望并网逆变器具备国际可识别的安全证据，尤其是光伏系统用功率变换器IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验报告。该要求可能出现在业主规格、援助融资项目文件、公用事业审查意见或EPC采购文件中，而非单一独立的马尔代夫光伏逆变器产品法规。对于屋顶、度假村、岛屿公用事业及光储项目，安全文件应识别准确的逆变器型号系列、功率等级、环境等级、保护功能和安装限制。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫光伏逆變器招標和公用事業審查通常期望併網逆變器具備國際可識別的安全證據，尤其是光伏系統用功率轉換器IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗報告。該要求可能出現在業主規格、援助融資項目文件、公用事業審查意見或EPC採購文件中，而非單一獨立的馬爾地夫光伏逆變器產品法規。對於屋頂、度假村、島嶼公用事業及光儲項目，安全文件應識別準確的逆變器型號系列、功率等級、環境等級、保護功能和安裝限制。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Project-owner, utility, EPC, or donor-financed tender safety requirements for Maldives PV projects

summary.en: China-market PV inverter safety evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, Chinese laboratory reports, and voluntary certification schemes. These documents may address safety, markings, insulation, protection, and environmental tests, but they are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates requested by Maldives tenders or utility engineers. Chinese reports should be cross-referenced to IEC clauses only where the test scope, sample model, rating, and acceptance criteria match.
summary.zh: 中国市场光伏逆变器安全证据通常依赖GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、中国实验室报告及自愿认证体系。这些文件可能覆盖安全、标识、绝缘、保护和环境测试，但并不自动等同于马尔代夫招标或公用事业工程师要求的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。只有在测试范围、样品型号、额定值和接受准则匹配时，才应将中国报告交叉引用至IEC条款。
summary.zht: 中國市場光伏逆變器安全證據通常依賴GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、中國實驗室報告及自願認證體系。這些文件可能覆蓋安全、標識、絕緣、保護和環境測試，但並不自動等同於馬爾地夫招標或公用事業工程師要求的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。只有在測試範圍、樣品型號、額定值和接受準則匹配時，才應將中國報告交叉引用至IEC條款。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
China voluntary PV inverter certification and CNAS-accredited test reports

gap.en: Gap: A China GB/T or NB/T safety certificate does not automatically satisfy Maldives IEC 62109 expectations. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports or certificates for the exact model family, prepare an English safety file, and show that installation conditions match the Maldives site. Include ingress protection, corrosion protection, enclosure temperature rise, isolation, residual-current behavior, and service-clearance assumptions for compact atoll installations.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T或NB/T安全证书并不自动满足马尔代夫IEC 62109预期。出口商应取得准确型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告或证书，准备英文安全文件，并证明安装条件符合马尔代夫现场。对于紧凑环礁安装，应包括防护等级、防腐蚀、外壳温升、隔离、剩余电流行为和维护间距假设。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T或NB/T安全證書並不自動滿足馬爾地夫IEC 62109預期。出口商應取得準確型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告或證書，準備英文安全文件，並證明安裝條件符合馬爾地夫現場。對於緊湊環礁安裝，應包括防護等級、防腐蝕、外殼溫升、隔離、剩餘電流行為和維護間距假設。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by the Maldives tender, owner engineer, STELCO, FENAKA, insurer, lender, or commissioning authority; IEC 62109 evidence is a common project gate for bankable PV inverter procurement
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or scheme-driven in China; China domestic safety evidence is useful but not automatically accepted as IEC 62109 proof

source.publisher: Ministry of Economic Development and Trade, Republic of Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence for the actual inverter model family and do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T certificates as automatic substitutes. Maldives projects are often reviewed through tender, utility, lender, or owner-engineer channels, so the safety file should be model-specific, English-language, and tied to the installation conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应为实际逆变器型号系列准备IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据，不要依赖中国GB/T或NB/T证书作为自动替代。马尔代夫项目通常通过招标、公用事业、贷款方或业主工程师渠道审查，因此安全文件应特定到型号、使用英文，并与安装条件相匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應為實際逆變器型號系列準備IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據，不要依賴中國GB/T或NB/T證書作為自動替代。馬爾地夫項目通常通過招標、公用事業、貸款方或業主工程師渠道審查，因此安全文件應特定到型號、使用英文，並與安裝條件相匹配。

requirement_topic.en: Tropical Marine Environment — Heat, Humidity, Salt Mist, Derating, and Space-Constrained Atoll Installation
requirement_topic.zh: 热带海洋环境——高温、高湿、盐雾、降额及空间受限环礁安装
requirement_topic.zht: 熱帶海洋環境——高溫、高濕、鹽霧、降額及空間受限環礁安裝

summary.en: Maldives PV inverter installations face extreme tropical heat, humidity, salt-laden air, flooding exposure, and space-constrained atoll layouts. Even where the core product standard is IEC 62109, project engineers may require environmental evidence such as outdoor ingress protection rating, corrosion or salt-mist suitability, thermal derating curves at high ambient temperature, ventilation clearances, enclosure material information, and installation instructions for coastal or rooftop environments. These requirements are especially important for island resorts, outer-atoll diesel-PV hybrids, and solar-plus-storage systems.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫光伏逆变器安装面临极端热带高温、高湿、含盐空气、洪涝暴露和空间受限环礁布局。即使核心产品标准为IEC 62109，项目工程师也可能要求环境证据，例如户外防护等级、防腐蚀或盐雾适用性、高环境温度下热降额曲线、通风间距、外壳材料信息，以及适用于沿海或屋顶环境的安装说明。这些要求对于岛屿度假村、外环礁柴油-光伏混合系统和光储系统尤其重要。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫光伏逆變器安裝面臨極端熱帶高溫、高濕、含鹽空氣、洪澇暴露和空間受限環礁布局。即使核心產品標準為IEC 62109，項目工程師也可能要求環境證據，例如戶外防護等級、防腐蝕或鹽霧適用性、高環境溫度下熱降額曲線、通風間距、外殼材料資訊，以及適用於沿海或屋頂環境的安裝說明。這些要求對於島嶼度假村、外環礁柴油-光伏混合系統和光儲系統尤其重要。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 environmental and safety construction evidence
IEC 60068-series environmental tests where specified by tender or owner engineer
Project-specific salt-mist, ingress-protection, thermal derating, and installation-clearance requirements for Maldives island sites

summary.en: China domestic inverter documentation often includes general environmental ratings, IP ratings, operating-temperature ranges, and GB/T or NB/T test reports. Those documents may not demonstrate suitability for Maldives marine exposure unless they include the same enclosure configuration, salt-mist or corrosion evidence, high-temperature derating data, and installation-clearance assumptions. A product validated for a China inland or standard rooftop profile may need extra evidence for Maldives atoll sites.
summary.zh: 中国国内逆变器文件通常包括一般环境等级、防护等级、工作温度范围及GB/T或NB/T测试报告。除非这些文件包含相同外壳配置、盐雾或腐蚀证据、高温降额数据和安装间距假设，否则可能无法证明适用于马尔代夫海洋暴露环境。针对中国内陆或标准屋顶场景验证的产品，可能需要为马尔代夫环礁现场补充证据。
summary.zht: 中國國內逆變器文件通常包括一般環境等級、防護等級、工作溫度範圍及GB/T或NB/T測試報告。除非這些文件包含相同外殼配置、鹽霧或腐蝕證據、高溫降額數據和安裝間距假設，否則可能無法證明適用於馬爾地夫海洋暴露環境。針對中國內陸或標準屋頂場景驗證的產品，可能需要為馬爾地夫環礁現場補充證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — environmental and safety requirements for PV grid-connected inverters
NB/T 32004-2018 — technical specification for PV grid-connected inverters
Manufacturer operating-temperature, IP-rating, derating, and installation manuals used for China domestic projects

gap.en: Gap: China domestic environmental claims may be too generic for Maldives island projects. Exporters should add model-specific derating curves, salt-mist or corrosion statements, IP and enclosure evidence, recommended shading and ventilation clearances, and maintenance instructions for salty, humid, high-temperature sites. Confirm whether the project requires stainless hardware, conformal coating, higher IP rating, elevated mounting, or additional enclosure protection.
gap.zh: 差距：中国国内环境声明对马尔代夫岛屿项目可能过于笼统。出口商应补充型号特定降额曲线、盐雾或腐蚀声明、防护等级和外壳证据、建议遮阳和通风间距，以及适用于盐雾、高湿、高温现场的维护说明。应确认项目是否要求不锈钢五金、三防涂覆、更高防护等级、抬高安装或额外外壳保护。
gap.zht: 差距：中國國內環境聲明對馬爾地夫島嶼項目可能過於籠統。出口商應補充型號特定降額曲線、鹽霧或腐蝕聲明、防護等級和外殼證據、建議遮陽和通風間距，以及適用於鹽霧、高濕、高溫現場的維護說明。應確認項目是否要求不鏽鋼五金、三防塗覆、更高防護等級、抬高安裝或額外外殼保護。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but often mandatory in practice because owner engineers, EPCs, insurers, or utilities may reject equipment that lacks environmental suitability evidence for Maldives island conditions
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic environmental ratings are product evidence but do not automatically prove suitability for tropical marine atoll installations

source.publisher: Ministry of Climate Change, Environment and Energy, Republic of Maldives

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Maldives projects, pair IEC 62109 safety evidence with environmental suitability evidence for heat, humidity, salt mist, and compact atoll installations. China-market IP ratings or temperature ranges are useful but should be backed by model-specific derating, corrosion, ventilation, and maintenance documentation for the actual site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于马尔代夫项目，应将IEC 62109安全证据与高温、高湿、盐雾和紧凑环礁安装的环境适用性证据配套提交。中国市场防护等级或温度范围有参考价值，但应由针对实际现场的型号特定降额、防腐蚀、通风和维护文件支持。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於馬爾地夫項目，應將IEC 62109安全證據與高溫、高濕、鹽霧和緊湊環礁安裝的環境適用性證據配套提交。中國市場防護等級或溫度範圍有參考價值，但應由針對實際現場的型號特定降額、防腐蝕、通風和維護文件支持。
